author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Mistfall Hunter - New Class Withered Knight Trailer
Mistfall Hunter is a dark fantasy extraction ARPG set in Weavereach, a shattered world where the gods have perished and the Gyldenmist sweeps the realm. 

As a new playable class, the Withered Knight stides into the Gyldenmist with a two-handed greatsword and a chivalric code that won't quit. Once the Rose Knights of the Kingdom of Gaenaria: sworn, ceremonial, gilded. Now they are exiles, now they cast to the North and branded “Withered Knights.”

Heading to XBOX on July 29, 2026. Play the free Open Beta demo starting June 14 at 6 PM PT.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/mistfall-hunter/9MVZG45QXFBG
